productDisplayName: Spalding Men's Running Royal Blue Shoe
description: spalding takes a step forward to show that they care for all Sports enthusiasts across the world. These extremely lightweight shoes will thrill an amateur runner as much asa pro. With its strong Trusstic system, these shoes take care of  both underpronators and overpronators. In case you want to add a dash of style, team it with rugged denims and a casual tee.Upper Mesh upper with synthetic stitched overlays for added durability Central lacing for customised comfortable Fit Heavily padded tongue and collar for snug fit Tongue with printed synthetic printed patch for added style Rubber outsole extended to the toe box and embedded onto it Extra synthetic patch over heel cup with brand logo for further addition to the structure Midsole Soft, cushioned midsole for all day step in comfort Full length phylon midsole for lightweight durability Outsole Trusstic unit extended to the sides for complete inner arch support Multi directional structures on the outsole for great grip Scooped heel cup for added air cushioning below the heel shoe careKeep your shoes away from the sunRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
